**Generated by:** /qa-plan

**Engine:** Unity 2022.3.62f1 (URP, Photon Fusion 2, PlayFab CBS)
**Sprint File:** `production/sprints/sprint-005.md`

---

**Allocation:** 5 Logic + 8 Integration = 13 stories require automated tests.
5 Config/Data stories require decision docs only. 1 playtest session required (S5-10).

---

## Automated Tests Required

### S5-01 — Logic
**Test file:** `tests/unit/ability/cbsability_slot_test.cs`
**What to test:**
- `EffectiveSlot` returns `Slot` when `Slot != 0`
- `EffectiveSlot` derives from `SkillKey` when `Slot == 0` via `SkillKeyToSlot` mapper
- `SkillKeyToSlot` mapper: Q→1, W→2, E→3, R→4, Item→5, Recall→6 (verify against `ability-system.md` or `ItemType.cs` enum)

**Edge cases:**
- `Slot == 0` AND `SkillKey == None` → assert exception OR documented default
- `Slot != 0` AND `Slot` mismatches `SkillKey`-derived slot → `Slot` field wins (additive schema)
- Unknown `SkillKey` value → mapper returns 0 or throws

**Estimated:** ~6 unit tests

### S5-02 — Logic
**Test file:** `tests/unit/ability/getslotaction_test.cs`
**What to test:**
- `ActorCombat.GetSlotAction(byte slot)` returns the same `ActorCombatAction` as `AbilityComponent.GetSlotAction(byte slot)` for all slots 1..6
- Returns null/default when slot has no bound ability
- Returns same instance across multiple calls (no allocation per call)

**Edge cases:** slot=0 (invalid), slot=255 (out of range), slot bound but ability uninitialized

**Estimated:** ~5 unit tests

### S5-03 — Logic
**Test file:** `tests/unit/ability/getactiveslot_test.cs`
**What to test:**
- `GetActiveSlot()` returns slot from latest `OnPressButtons` call
- After `OnReleaseButtons`, `GetActiveSlot()` returns 0 or last-released slot (verify which is intended)
- `IsQuickCast(byte slot)` returns the per-slot config flag from `KeybindMap`
- `IsQuickCast(0)` and out-of-range slots return false

**Edge cases:** Q→W chain (assert latest wins), simultaneous press of 2 buttons

**Estimated:** ~5 unit tests

### S5-04 — Integration
**Test file:** `tests/integration/combat/pattern_a_owner_guard_test.cs`
**What to test:**
- Each of 5 replaced sites: `IsActiveSlotOwner(slot)` returns true when caller's slot matches `GetActiveSlot()` and false otherwise
- Helper handles `SkillKey.Item` (no slot) gracefully (returns false or special-case)

**Edge cases:** slot=0, slot bound to dead ability, AbilityComponent null

**Estimated:** ~7 integration tests + Multipeer harness Pass #1-5 as gate

### S5-05 — Integration
**Test file:** `tests/integration/combat/pattern_bcd_test.cs`
**What to test:**
- 4 replaced sites still produce same outputs as pre-refactor (capture before-snapshot during dev, assert after)
- Pattern-B (input-to-slot binding): `BindSlot` produces correct slot
- Pattern-C (rank-up exclusions): excluded slots not affected
- Pattern-D (quick-cast settings): per-slot quick-cast respected

**Estimated:** ~6 integration tests

### S5-06 — Integration
**Test file:** `tests/integration/animation/animation_event_slot_test.cs`
**What to test:**
- All 42 shim methods compile (auto-generated assertion)
- Each shim method routes through `GetActiveSlot()` correctly
- Animation event triggered at frame X resolves to correct slot at runtime

**Estimated:** ~10 integration tests (sample 10 of 42 shims)

### S5-07 — Integration
**Test file:** `tests/integration/hercules/hercules_r_input_test.cs`
**What to test:**
- `HerculesRAction.GetInput` reads `PressedSlot` (S3-04 path) instead of legacy `Buttons.R`
- Charge state begins on Press, ends on Release
- Release path still uses `Buttons.R` (S3-05 ReleasedSlot deferred — known limitation, document)

**Edge cases:** Press during cooldown, multi-press during charge, release without prior press

**Estimated:** ~5 integration tests

### S5-08 — Integration
**Test file:** `tests/integration/hercules/hercules_w_sibling_test.cs`
**What to test:**
- 5 sibling reads use `GetSlotAction` and return same values as legacy direct access
- Snapshot-style: capture pre-refactor outputs, assert post-refactor matches

**Estimated:** ~5 integration tests

### S5-09 — Integration
**Test file:** `tests/integration/hercules/hercules_bootstrap_test.cs`
**What to test:**
- `ActorCombat.OnStartup` calls `BindSlot(slot, abilityId)` exactly 4 times for Hercules (Q, W, E, R)
- After bootstrap, `GetSlotAction(slot)` returns expected ability for each of 4 slots
- Bootstrap idempotent — calling twice doesn't double-bind

**Edge cases:** OnStartup with missing CBS data, OnStartup before AbilityRegistry ready

**Estimated:** ~5 integration tests + PeerMode=Single playtest gate

### S5-11 — Logic (conditional on implement-path decision)
**Test file:** `tests/unit/item/role_restriction_test.cs`
**What to test (only if S5-11 chooses implement path):**
- `AvailableToPurchase()` returns false when `item.Positions[]` does not contain `Hero.Role`
- Returns true when role matches OR `Positions[]` is empty (universal item)
- Other gates (Money, Mythic, Boots, Inventory full) still respected

**Estimated:** ~6 unit tests (skip if S5-11 chooses remove-field path)

### S5-17 — Integration
**Test file:** `tests/integration/networking/multipeer_duplicate_start_test.cs`
**What to test:**
- `AbilityMultipeerRunner.Start` called twice on same instance does not produce GameIsFull cascade
- Guard logs warning + early-returns

**Estimated:** ~3 integration tests + console-clean assertion during harness

### S5-18 — Logic (perf)
**Test file:** `tests/performance/ability/registry_boot_benchmark.cs`
**What to test:**
- Cold-start `AbilityRegistry` scan completes in **< 100 ms** for 158 prefabs (acceptance threshold)
- Warm-start scan completes in **< 50 ms**
- Memory peak during scan documented (no regression vs current 511.9 ms warm / 1079 ms cold)

**Estimated:** ~3 perf tests (cold, warm, memory)

---

## Manual QA Checklist

### S5-04..S5-09 — Hercules manual playthrough
**Verification method:** Manual playthrough in PeerMode=Single
**Sign-off:** gameplay-programmer + qa-tester
**Evidence:** Screen recording or screenshot per QWER + console log clean

Checklist:
- [ ] Hercules Q (basic attack) fires correctly with Q press
- [ ] Hercules W slow effect applies + sibling reads work (item-system buffs interact correctly)
- [ ] Hercules E behaves identically to pre-refactor
- [ ] Hercules R charge starts on R press, ramps speed correctly
- [ ] Hercules R release fires charge dash (using legacy Buttons.R — known limitation OK)
- [ ] No null reference exceptions in Console
- [ ] AnimationEvent fires at correct frame for each ability

### S5-10 — Sprint-final integration playtest
**Verification method:** 1-match Training mode playthrough (Hercules vs bot)
**Sign-off:** qa-tester + producer
**Evidence:** `production/qa/evidence/sprint-005-hercules-playthrough.md` + screen recording

Checklist:
- [ ] Match boots to playable state (Hercules joins, bot opponent ready)
- [ ] All 4 Hercules abilities (QWER) usable mid-match
- [ ] Item use (recall, consume, spell, attack) plays correct animation
- [ ] No crash, no error spike in Console
- [ ] Multipeer harness Pass #1-5 all green (run separately)
- [ ] FPS stays within ±10% of pre-Phase-2 baseline (no perf regression)

### S5-13 — Garen variant cleanup
**Verification method:** Editor visual inspection
**Sign-off:** art-director + lead-programmer
**Evidence:** Screenshot of AnimatorOverrideController inspector showing base = `RadiusBasicLocomotion.controller` (if swapped) OR deletion confirmation (if legacy)

Checklist (depends on decision):
- [ ] Decision documented in `item-system.md` §Known Issues (legacy vs production)
- [ ] If legacy → 3 controllers deleted + .meta files deleted + no broken references
- [ ] If production → base swapped to `RadiusBasicLocomotion.controller` + Item_Viable parameter accessible

---

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before any QA hand-off for this sprint:

1. ✅ Game launches to main menu without crash
2. ✅ New Training match can be started with Hercules
3. ✅ **Hercules QWER abilities all functional** (primary mechanic changed this sprint)
4. ✅ **Multipeer harness Pass #1-5 green** (regression risk from Phase 2 ability refactor)
5. ✅ AnimationEvent shim methods route correctly (S5-06 risk)
6. ✅ AbilityRegistry boot completes (S5-18 if pulled — perf threshold)
7. ✅ PeerMode=Single config preserved (S4-P5 workflow guard)

Run via `/smoke-check sprint` after S5-10 completes.

---

## Playtest Requirements

| Story | Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player |
|-------|------|--------------|---------------|
| S5-10 | Verify Hercules QWER playable end-to-end after Phase 2 refactor; identify regression vs pre-Phase-2 feel | 1 | Experienced player familiar with Hercules pre-refactor |

**Sign-off:** Playtest notes → `production/qa/evidence/sprint-005-hercules-playthrough.md` + qa-tester sign-off

---

## Definition of Done — Sprint 005

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — automated test pass OR documented manual evidence
- [ ] Test file exists at specified path for all Logic and Integration stories
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for Visual/Feel and UI stories (none this sprint)
- [ ] Smoke check passes (`/smoke-check sprint` after all stories done)
- [ ] No regressions vs pre-Phase-2 baseline (multipeer harness + manual)
- [ ] Code reviewed (`/code-review` per story)
- [ ] Story status updated in `production/sprint-status.yaml` (via `/story-done`)
- [ ] ADR-0006 Phase 2 → Phase 3 handover criteria (§10) signed off
- [ ] ADR-0008 (Role Restriction) Status=Accepted before sprint close
